.gitignore.general_idea: Remove explicit HELP.md from gitignore as it is likely no longer generated or tracked.
Simplify target directory ignore pattern by removing leading slash.
Remove IntelliJ workspace file ignore pattern.
Remove IntelliJ project file ignore pattern.
Add IntelliJ output directory to gitignore.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.7 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 21 is unsupported and causes compatibility issues with modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project description to reflect the migration to Spring Boot 3.x.
Set the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2.0 and modern libraries expect Java 17+; explicitly setting 21 ensures the compiler and runtime use the correct bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade springdoc-openapi version to 2.3.0 to support Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: springdoc-openapi 1.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE); version 2.x is required for compilation and runtime functionality.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jsoup dependency for HTML parsing, likely for XSS validation features.
Remove spring-boot-starter-data-rest dependency as part of refactoring.
Replace legacy springdoc-openapi-ui and related modules with the unified springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old springdoc-openapi-ui artifact is not compatible with Spring Boot 3.x; the starter-webmvc-ui is the required replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove springdoc-openapi-data-rest dependency since Data REST starter was removed.
Remove springdoc-openapi-security dependency as it is now included in the starter-webmvc-ui or handled differently.
Add jackson-datatype-hibernate5-jakarta to handle Hibernate 5/6 integration with Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE; the standard jackson-datatype-hibernate5 uses javax.persistence, causing compile/runtime errors without the jakarta variant.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Register Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace in Jackson serialization for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Runtime failure: Jackson cannot serialize Hibernate entities correctly without the Jakarta-specific module in Spring Boot 3.x (which uses Jakarta EE 9+).

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Add MixIn configuration for ProblemDetail to fix JSON serialization issues with its properties map.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Runtime failure: ProblemDetail serialization may fail or produce incorrect JSON structure without explicit visibility configuration for its properties.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Store the configured ObjectMapper in a utility class for application-wide access.
Update import path for GroupedOpenApi to match SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x package structure.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.why_exists: Class io.swagger.v3.oas.models.GroupedOpenApi moved to org.springdoc.core.models.GroupedOpenApi in SpringDoc 2.x; old import causes compile error 'package does not exist' or 'class not found'.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Update test credentials in OpenAPI documentation description.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.after:
- user@yandex.ru / password
- admin@gmail.com / admin
- guest@gmail.com / guest

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Remove exclusion of /api/profile/** paths from the OpenAPI group definition.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.general_idea: Simplify AppException by removing dependency on Spring's ResponseStatusException and ErrorAttributeOptions.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.before: public class AppException extends ResponseStatusException { ... private final ErrorAttributeOptions options; ... public AppException(HttpStatus status, String message, ErrorAttributeOptions options) { super(status, message); this.options = options; } ... }
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.after: public class AppException extends RuntimeException { ... public AppException(@NonNull String message) { super(message); } ... }

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/error/.general_idea: Remove unused Lombok and Spring Web error attribute imports.
Add Spring's @NonNull annotation import for parameter validation.
Simplify exception constructor by removing Spring Boot 3 specific error attribute options.
Remove unused imports related to Spring Boot error attributes and HTTP status.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Remove dependency on Spring Data's Persistable interface and replace with custom HasId interface.

Remove methods required by the Persistable interface (id() and isNew()) as the class no longer implements it.
Migrate JPA and Validation annotations from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.why_exists: javax.persistence and javax.validation packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package does not exist' errors.

Remove Spring Cache annotations to simplify caching strategy or move it elsewhere.
